title: Zen Legions
description: The Ultimate Optimization and PvP modpack
body:
![Zen Legions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55bcf998ebc95b7ce65c666860532a85c70e6062_0.webp)
**The Best Modpack for Minecraft Optimization and PvP with many functions Such as:**
- **100+ fps on low-end devices**
- **best for PvP in servers**
- **has many quality of life mods**
- **Performance mods like sodium,lithium and much more are added to make your gaming experence better**
- **includes features that allow you to experience Minecraft just as you remember it, no matter what version you've used before**

**And We also have a [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/dyvRNhuyqE) that you can join for support. This modpack will also get updated to the newest version fast as possible**


###  FAQ
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Q: How do I install, update, add mods, or do something else?

A: Yes you can update the mod after downloading the modpack.

Q: If something broken what sould I do?

A: Go to our disocrd and send a screenshot of your problem.

Q: I like the modpack. How can I contribute?

A: You can join our discord server and promote the modpack.
